name: Spinach Quiche (Inn)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium skillet, melt the butter with garlic over low heat and fry the spinach until it is just wilted. Remove from heat and let cool.
2. In a large bowl, whisk together the eggs, cottage cheese, Monterey Jack cheese, breadcrumbs, and seasonings.
3. Add the cooled spinach to the egg mixture and stir until combined.
4. Pour the batter into a greased glass baking dish.
5. Bake in a preheated 350°F (175°C) oven for 30 to 45 minutes, or until set.
Notes: Recipes from Specialties of the House: A Country Inn and Bed & Breakfast Cookbook by Julia M. Pitkin. (Cumberland House, 1996). ISBN: 1-888952-00-8 Reviewed by http://www.lisaekus.com/spring97/spechouse.html
